result.summary: Chatwoot exposes three REST API surfaces—Application API, Platform API, and public Client API—plus a `chatwoot` CLI; no GraphQL or MCP server surfaced in the public docs.
result.description: Chatwoot is an open-source customer support platform for managing conversations across website chat, email, social, messaging, and other channels. It is available as a cloud service or self-hosted software and includes tools for inbox management, automation, help centers, and agent workflows.

user_api_token.label: User API access token
user_api_token.setup: Sign in to your Chatwoot account, then generate a user `access_token` from **Profile Settings** / **API access token**. The API docs say Application APIs require a user token generated from profile settings, and the CLI login flow asks for the same token from your agent profile. Use your Chatwoot instance base URL (for example `https://app.chatwoot.com`) and your numeric account ID alongside it when a tool asks for them. See [API introduction](https://developers.chatwoot.com/api-reference/introduction) and [CLI setup](https://developers.chatwoot.com/cli).

api_inbox_id_pair.label: API inbox identifier plus contact identifier
api_inbox_id_pair.setup: Create an **API inbox** in Chatwoot (**Settings → Configuration**) to get the `inbox_identifier`. Then call the Client API endpoint to create a contact; the returned contact/session identifier is the `contact_identifier` / `source_id` used on conversation and message endpoints. The docs describe Client APIs as using `inbox_identifier` from the API inbox and `contact_identifier` returned when creating a contact. See [API introduction](https://developers.chatwoot.com/api-reference/introduction) and [Create a contact](https://developers.chatwoot.com/api-reference/contacts-api/create-a-contact.md).

variables.name: account_id
variables.resolveFrom: your Chatwoot dashboard URL or account context
variables.description: Numeric Chatwoot account ID used on account-scoped endpoints.

variables.name: inbox_identifier
variables.resolveFrom: Settings → Configuration in an API inbox

variables.name: contact_identifier
variables.resolveFrom: Returned by the create-contact client API call
variables.description: Public contact/session identifier used on conversation and message endpoints.
